signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 159.58 — 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains bid; Middle East tensions introduce intervention risk on a break above 160.00. JPY COT LF short −80,578 (crowded carry). Carry dominates until VIX > 25; 160.00 is the key intervention threshold.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD COT LF net long +47,218 vs HV30 at 8.2% and ATM IV at 9.4% — options pricing a 1.2 vol-pt premium over realized. Positioning stalling, late-trend caution signal. A LF delta turning positive would invalidate the caution read.

signals.title: CAD/EUR — G8 Bilateral Theme + Carry
signals.text: CAD leads G8 (+0.468% avg, 3 pairs) while EUR lags (−0.479% avg, 7 pairs); CAD/EUR spread 0.947%. BoC 2.25% vs ECB 2.0% — 25bp CAD carry advantage drives the divergence.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp GBP carry neutral. GBP LF net long +33,517; AM constructive — positioning aligned with carry read. GBP/USD at 1.3515 mid-range; 1.3600 is the next resistance on a continuation.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + RBNZ
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short −18,062 (specs fading a hawkish CB) vs RBNZ hike 40% priced for 27 May. If RBNZ delivers or signals hike, short-squeeze risk is elevated — crowded spec short unwind targets 0.5900+. NZD/USD at 0.5872.
